request: Two direct bug fixes: (1) MCP calls table — timestamps displayed as raw Python datetime string with microseconds; format as EU datetime DD-MMM-YYYY HH:MM:SS AM/PM. (2) Investor onboarding flow v2 — selecting 1yr in Step 1 did not auto-select Next Purchase in Step 2, Step 3 showed 5yr default with Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 labels instead of 3m/6m/9m/12m; long horizon stops were 4 options to 20yr instead of 5 options at 3yr steps to 15yr.

agents.notes: Fix 1: added fmtDT() EU formatter to ds/utils.js + fmt column support to mkTbl(); applied to MCP table timestamp column in ds/mcp.js. Commits a50dd05 (pushed to prod). Fix 2: SLIDER_STOPS.short labels Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4→3m/6m/9m/12m; SLIDER_STOPS.long [5y,10y,15y,20y]→[3y,6y,9y,12y,15y]; added INVESTOR_TO_GOAL map + selectGoal() to Card 1 click handler in investor-flow/v2/index.html. Commit 2b2be01 (pushed to prod).

human_score.notes: Fixes were correct but investor flow change not visible on local env without hard refresh — caused confusion
